name: Kubernetes Threat Detection & Response
description: Detects and responds to threats within Kubernetes clusters. Riggs AI analyzes suspicious activity such as unauthorized pod creation, RBAC misuse, or anomalous API server calls. Confirmed threats trigger RBAC audit, namespace isolation, incident ticket creation, and team alerting. Non-threatening activity is documented with severity adjustment.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Kubernetes API
required_integrations.reason: Audit RBAC bindings, isolate namespaces, and inspect API server audit logs

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for confirmed Kubernetes threats

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Alert the platform engineering and security teams of Kubernetes threats

config.description: Triggers when suspicious Kubernetes activity is detected such as unauthorized pod creation, RBAC anomalies, or unusual API server calls

config.additional_instructions: Focus on Kubernetes-specific threats: RBAC abuse, unauthorized workloads, API server anomalies, service account misuse
config.description: AI-powered analysis of Kubernetes threat indicators to determine severity and recommended response actions
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed a genuine Kubernetes threat

config.query: List all ClusterRoleBindings and RoleBindings for service account={{trigger_1.alert.service_account}} and namespace={{trigger_1.alert.namespace}}, including recent role changes in last 24h
config.description: Audit RBAC bindings associated with the threat actor to identify excessive permissions or recent privilege grants

parameters.reason: Kubernetes threat detected — isolating namespace pending investigation

config.description: Apply deny-all network policy to the affected namespace to contain the threat and prevent lateral movement
Create an incident ticket documenting the Kubernetes threat and all response actions
Notify the security and platform engineering teams of the Kubernetes threat and containment actions

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). Kubernetes activity determined non-threatening. Confidence: {{analyze_1.confidence}}. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that AI analysis did not confirm a Kubernetes threat
Kubernetes threat detection and response complete
